memories.title: Northern Lights Glow
memories.subtitle: Arctic Wonder 2026
memories.description: Standing in freezing temperatures, watching emerald and violet ribbons of light dance across the dark Arctic sky. Truly a bucket list memory.

memories.title: Epic Sea Cliffs
memories.subtitle: Coastline Roadtrip 2026
memories.description: Driving along the coastal highway, stopping to peer over massive, vertical sea cliffs dropping straight down into the wild ocean below.
memories.shortDescription: Rugged sea cliffs and crashing waves.

memories.title: City Sunrise Skyline
memories.subtitle: New Horizons 2026
memories.description: The golden morning sun rising right between high-tech skyscrapers, reflecting brilliant beams off the glass facades.

memories.title: Hot Air Balloon Flight
memories.subtitle: Floating in Sky
memories.description: Drifting silently above agricultural fields and rolling hills in a hot air balloon, experiencing a bird's eye view of the landscape.

memories.title: Rustic Greenhouse Cafe
memories.subtitle: Weekend Brunch
memories.description: Enjoying freshly baked pastries and warm tea surrounded by overflowing hanging plants and flowers inside an elegant glasshouse cafe.

memories.title: Rainy Window Reads
memories.subtitle: Stormy Afternoon
memories.description: Listening to the heavy thumping of rain against the glass pane, cozy inside with a steaming mug of cocoa and a thriller novel.
memories.shortDescription: Raindrops on glass and hot cocoa.

memories.title: Cycling Through Fields
memories.subtitle: Green Escape
memories.description: Renting bikes and riding along paved paths through lush green fields and farms, stopping to feed horses and enjoy a small picnic.

memories.title: Board Game Night
memories.subtitle: Playful Competition
memories.description: An intense, laughter-filled evening playing strategic board games, arguing over rules, and eating pizza with the family.

memories.title: First Snow Sunrise
memories.subtitle: Winter Dawn
memories.description: Waking up to a magical blanket of fresh, untouched white snow. The rising sun turned the winter landscape into a glowing pink dream.
memories.shortDescription: Magical pink sunrise on fresh snow.

memories.title: Dusk over City Bridges
memories.subtitle: Evening Skyline
memories.description: Standing on a suspension bridge as the sky shifted to a deep purple, with car tail lights forming long golden streaks below.

memories.title: Art Gallery Visit
memories.subtitle: Culture Day
memories.description: Walking through high-ceilinged white galleries, looking at massive modern oil paintings and trying to interpret their abstract meanings.

memories.title: Ethereal Sunrise Mist
memories.subtitle: Dawn Collection
memories.description: A breathtaking dawn over a calm lake. A dense blanket of mist hovered over the water, parting gently as the golden rays of the sun filtered through the tall pine trees.

memories.title: Crimson Sunset Horizons
memories.subtitle: Dusk Collection
memories.description: Witnessing the sky catch fire in brilliant hues of crimson and purple as the sun dipped behind the mountain range, casting long shadows across the valley.

memories.title: Dreamy Beach Twilight
memories.subtitle: Dusk Collection
memories.description: A soft twilight walk on the wet sand. The entire beach reflected the lilac and violet clouds, making it feel like we were walking on water in the sky.

memories.title: Golden Hour Forest
memories.subtitle: Dawn Rays
memories.description: Golden pillars of light piercing through a thick morning forest, illuminating the dew on the green ferns below.

memories.title: Purple Mountain Slopes
memories.subtitle: Dusk Peak
memories.description: The snow-dusted peak of a towering mountain glowing in soft violet hues just after the sun has set, under a pale pink sky.

memories.title: Misty River Pier
memories.subtitle: Dawn Quiet
memories.description: Sitting at the edge of a wooden dock in the early morning, with fog so thick the other side of the river was completely invisible.
memories.shortDescription: Foggy morning on the wooden dock.

memories.title: City Bridge Twilight
memories.subtitle: Dusk Sparkle
memories.description: The golden streetlights of the city beginning to flicker on as the sky turns a deep royal blue over the shipping lanes.
memories.shortDescription: Royal blue twilight over bridge lanes.

memories.title: Dewy Meadow Rise
memories.subtitle: Dawn Dew
memories.description: Zooming in on a single blade of grass covered in tiny morning dew droplets, reflecting the rising orange sun like small crystal beads.

memories.title: Ocean Cliff Twilight
memories.subtitle: Dusk Shoreline
memories.description: Standing on a high cliff overlooking a dark ocean, watching the white foam of waves clash violently in the last bit of twilight.
memories.shortDescription: Ocean wave foam clash in twilight.

memories.title: Sunbeam Wheat Fields
memories.subtitle: Dawn Rays
memories.description: Early morning light skimming across fields of wild golden wheat, making the entire field seem like a sea of light.

memories.title: Pink Forest Sunrise
memories.subtitle: Dawn Glow
memories.description: An incredibly rare morning where the clouds lined up to reflect a deep hot pink sunrise, coloring the entire pine forest below.
memories.shortDescription: Vibrant pink dawn sky over pine forest.
